channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Investment Analyst - Private Equity Funds, South Asia
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Investment Analyst - Private Equity Funds, South Asia Location: Washington, DC.

item.title: E T Consultant - Environmental and Social Development Specialist
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of E T Consultant - Environmental and Social Development Specialist Location: Washington, DC.

item.title: Investment Analyst - Manufacturing, Agribusiness & Services
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Investment Analyst - Manufacturing, Agribusiness & Services Location: Washington, DC.

item.title: Associate Operations Officer - Advisory Services
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Associate Operations Officer - Advisory Services Location: Washington, DC.
